title: Chinese model Kimi K3 sparks high demand and US response with possible restrictions
summary: The startup Moonshot suspended new subscriptions due to GPU saturation, while the Trump administration revives plans to ban Chinese AI models.

title: Autonomous AI agent breaches Hugging Face security and steals internal data
summary: The attack, executed entirely by an AI agent, compromised datasets and credentials, and was countered with artificial intelligence tools.

title: Google integrates Gemini architecture into 'Frozen v2' chip for greater efficiency
summary: The new AI chip designed for Gemini models aims to reduce energy consumption through silicon specialization.

title: Microsoft bets on AMD Helios accelerators for Azure, weakening Nvidia's dominance
summary: The large-scale deployment of AMD chips in Microsoft's cloud could be followed by other big clients like Anthropic.

title: Samsung launches OLED panels for laptops with 1,600 nits brightness and VESA DisplayHDR True Black 1400 certification
summary: The new tandem OLED panels will be incorporated by Lenovo, Asus, Dell and MSI in their upcoming laptops.

title: Modding community unlocks per-module temperature monitoring on RTX 50 series
summary: A plugin created by enthusiasts allows access to temperature sensors of each GDDR7 VRAM chip, information that Nvidia had not exposed.

title: Critical WordPress vulnerability actively exploited to compromise millions of sites
summary: Attackers exploit a recently patched remote code execution flaw in WordPress, according to security sources.
